features.name: vpi_get vpiDirection on hierarchical ports
features.description: Code should include vpi_get(vpiDirection, portHandle) where portHandle references a port on a sub-module instance, not just top-level ports
features.snippet:
vpiHandle portHandle = vpi_handle_by_name("sub.inst", NULL);
PLI_INT32 dir = vpi_get(vpiDirection, portHandle);

features.name: VPI port handle via vpi_handle_by_name
features.description: Code should include vpi_handle_by_name used to obtain a handle to a port on a hierarchical path (sub-module instance) for subsequent property queries
